content_body:
We had a wonderful time.  The cabin was exquisite, very accommodating, and cozy.  I cannot wait until we come back again.

We had an amazing time at Serendipity.  This cabin was serene and luxurious.  We will definitely be coming back

We had an awesome time.  This cabin and the beautiful landscape is sooo relaxing.  My husband and I really enjoyed ourselves with our family and friends.  We'll be back soon from NJ.

The Good Life Crew
title: Good Times in Blue Ridge!
